name: Deb Fischer
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,594,052 for Deb Fischer in U.S. Senate, NE. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,594,052.
